detailed_explanation: The color red. Also means 'red light' (stop), 'bare/uncovered' (赤裸々), and 'new/unfired' (e.g., raw recruit).
example_sentences: ["赤いりんご - Red apple","赤信号 - Red light/stop","赤ちゃんはまだ赤だ - The baby is still small/new"]
usage_notes: 赤信号 (red traffic light) = stop. 赤点 (failing grade). 赤字 (deficit/red ink).

detailed_explanation: Blue or green color in Japanese. Also means 'green' in traffic lights (青信号), 'unripe/inexperienced', and 'youthful'.
example_sentences: ["青い空 - Blue sky","青信号 - Green light/go","青い果物 - Unripe fruit","青春 - Youth (blue spring)"]
usage_notes: 青 = both blue and green. 青信号 = go. 青臭い = naive/smells of youth. 青葉 = green leaves.

detailed_explanation: Red-colored. I-adjective form describing the color red.
example_sentences: ["赤い花 - Red flower","顔が赤い - Face is red","赤い目 - Red eyes"]
usage_notes: 赤い directly modifies nouns. 赤 is the noun form. Can describe embarrassment (顔が赤い).

detailed_explanation: Blue or green colored. Describes both sky blue and plant green. Also 'inexperienced'.
example_sentences: ["青い海 - Blue sea","青い山 - Green mountains","青い若者 - Young inexperienced youth","唇が青い - Blue lips (cold/pale)"]
usage_notes: 青い = blue/green adjective. 青い also means 'pale' (lips turning blue from cold).

detailed_explanation: Baby or infant (typically under 1-2 years). Endearing term.
example_sentences: ["赤ちゃんが泣く - Baby cries","赤ちゃんの服 - Baby clothes","赤ちゃんが生まれた - A baby was born"]
usage_notes: Neutral/polite. 赤ん坊 (more casual/colloquial). ベビー (loanword, also used).

detailed_explanation: Morning meal, breakfast. ごはん originally means rice/meal.
example_sentences: ["朝ごはんを食べる - Eat breakfast","朝ごはんはパン - Breakfast is bread","朝ごはん抜き - Skipping breakfast"]
usage_notes: ごはん = rice/meal. 朝 = morning. 朝飯 (ちょうはん) more casual/written. Western: モーニング.","朝ごはんはパン - Breakfast is bread","朝ごはん抜き - Skipping breakfast"]
